title: Shri Siddhidatri Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Siddhidatri Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Siddhidatri.
description:
Jai Siddhidatri Maa tu siddhi ki daata,
Tu bhakton ki rakshak tu daason ki mata.
Tera naam lete hi milti hai siddhi,
Tere naam se man ki hoti hai shuddhi॥
॥ Jai Siddhidatri Mata ॥

Kathin kaam siddh karti ho tum,
Jabhi haath sevak ke sir dharti ho tum.
Teri puja mein to na koi vidhi hai,
Tu Jagdambe daati tu sarvasiddhi hai॥
॥ Jai Siddhidatri Mata ॥

Ravivaar ko tera sumiran kare jo,
Teri murti ko hi man mein dhare jo.
Tu sab kaaj uske karti hai poore,
Kabhi kaam uske rahe na adhoore॥
॥ Jai Siddhidatri Mata ॥

Tumhari daya aur tumhari yeh maya,
Rakhe jiske sir par maiya apni chhaya.
Sarvasiddhi daati vah hai bhagyashali,
Jo hai tere dar ka hi Ambe sawali॥
॥ Jai Siddhidatri Mata ॥

Himachal hai parvat jahan vaas tera,
Maha Nanda mandir mein hai vaas tera.
Mujhe aasra hai tumhara hi mata,
Bhakti hai sawali tu jiski daata॥
॥ Jai Siddhidatri Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Siddhidatri's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Siddhidatri is the provider of all Siddhis (supernatural powers). Her Aarti grants wisdom, perfection, and salvation; it marks the auspicious completion of Navratri sadhana.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The ninth day of Navratri (Navami) is dedicated to Maa Siddhidatri and is considered the most auspicious for her worship.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Siddhidatri during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is very fond of seasonal fruits, Kheer, Halwa, and Poori.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full devotion and faith in the home temple on the ninth day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Devi Siddhidatryai Namah' after the Aarti is best for spiritual attainment and ultimate peace of mind.
